environment_type: Primary setting for climax and romantic resolution; Grand Zodangan audience chamber.
visual_summary: A massive, high-ceilinged palace hall characterized by regal architecture and a wide floor space suitable for cavalry movement. The room features a central raised dais/throne platform and is decorated with ceremonial golden chains. Large panoramic windows define the perimeter of the chamber.
layout_notes: Massive scale with high ceilings; includes a central throne platform/raised dais and wide floor space capable of hosting skirmishes or cavalry charges.
lighting: Influenced by large window openings; transitions from ceremonial stillness to shifting shadows caused by combat.
mood: High-stakes and chaotic, transitioning from ceremonial stillness to violent skirmish.
recurring_elements: Ceremonial golden chains (noted as shattered during events)
constraints: Scale must remain massive to support high ceilings and wide floor space
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural style of "regal architecture" is not detailed beyond being Zodangan.
Exact number or placement of the large panoramic windows is unspecified.
